---
title: "Laura Rose Werner"
description: "Contributor to nycOpenData and NYC Open Data Week 2026"
---

## Project

- [Domestic Violence Incidents vs Recourse Allocation Across NYC](../nyc-open-data-2026/09-Domestic-Violence-Incidents-vs-Recourse-Allocation-Across-NYC-Laura.qmd)

## Links

-   [GitHub](https://github.com/laurarosewerner)
